releaseNotes: • Faster source refresh (part 3 — the big one): channel search now uses a lightweight word index that updates as channels load, instead of one that had to be fully rebuilt — re-scanning your entire channel list — after every source. That rebuild was the single largest cost (3+ minutes per large source). Search now matches by word or start of name (e.g. "fox" finds "FOX Sports", "espn" finds "ESPN HD"). Your search index upgrades automatically on first launch after this update. (Phone and TV both benefit.)
